title: N@buwzaradan #5018
definition:
Nebuzaradan = "Nebo has given seed"

 1) a general of Nebuchadnezzar's army at the capture of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:

 1) a general of Nebuchadnezzar's army at the capture of Jerusalem

    NASB:  Nebo has given seed, a Bab. general
